reviews.comment:
Muy buena la estación de servicio. Los baños siempre limpios y bien mantenidos. Lo único malo es la cantidad de autos, siempre está llena.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is very good. The bathrooms are always clean and well maintained. The only downside is the number of cars; it's always full.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoaE1PRDRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Destacable la atención y amabilidad de todo el personal; toma de reserva, cafeteria, playa combustible, etc.
Habitaciones cómodas, limpieza impecable.
Los seguiremos eligiendo,  sin dudas.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were incredibly attentive and friendly; from reservations and the cafeteria to the gas station and fuel station.
The rooms were comfortable and the cleanliness was impeccable. We will definitely continue to choose them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodUw2dThBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Solo comí, y seguí viaje. Mucha gente en los surtidores, mucha espera

(Translated by Google)
I just ate and continued on my way. Lots of people at the pumps, long waits.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoMk5Hbl9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pedimos un té con leche para llevar pero no lo hacen en tamaño grande porque por sistema no lo puede hacer… ósea tiene vasos grandes pero si el sistema no le deja no lo hace, no había problema con pagar más o lo que corresponda pero podría preparar un vaso grande y cobrar lo que sea el sistema, el sobre costo es solo un poco más de agua caliente después de todo y uno se va contento.

(Translated by Google)
We ordered a milky tea to go, but they don't make it in a large size because the system can't do it... I mean, they have large glasses, but if the system doesn't allow it, they won't do it. There was no problem with paying more or whatever, but they could prepare a large glass and charge whatever the system charges. The extra cost is just a little more hot water, after all, and you leave happy.

reviewReply.comment:
Buenas tardes debemos respetar sistema. Pero trataremos el tema.

Saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoaU1pX2J3EAE
